format_legend.no-cook: both partners assemble at once (safest for one kitchen)
format_legend.two-roles: one dish: person A preps, person B works the stove
format_legend.two-components: one plate: one part cooks while the other is assembled

meta.notes: Every dish is 15-min doable in one home kitchen with a single stove. new-pair = first/second date (light only). repair = calm cooperative night.

fields.pantry_core: 3-5 must-have staples the dish cannot be made without; the pantry filter matches against these. Secret ingredients are separate and always substitutable.
